non_blocking_issues: Cross-session inferred-model leak on draft materialization: createSessionInWorkdir does NOT clear currentModel, so a stale inference from a prior session gets persisted to the freshly-materialized session when the user never explicitly switched. Recommend clearing currentModel in createSessionInWorkdir OR gating materialization-persistence on an explicit-switch flag.
cappedNavPush itemSize estimate assumes uniform item heights; the firstVisibleItemIndex >= target-1 guarantee is approximate for non-uniform lists.

Test D2 verifies repository.sendMessage receives the model via the currentModel fallback (getModelForSession globally null in setUp), not via the just-persisted value; proves the setModelForSession call but not that persistence is load-bearing for THIS send.
Leftover println debug in ChatMessageNavFabBounceTest (removed pre-release).
notes: Both fixes logically correct; tests faithful/deterministic. switchSessionModel draft-mode update + materialization-persistence ordering sound (SharedPreferences.apply() updates in-memory cache synchronously). Inferred-model leak is most material but cosmetic/user-correctable and partly pre-existing; shippable for 0.3.7.
